title: echinocystis pubescens
intro: Echinocystis pubescens, also known as the smooth caltrop or buffalo gourd, is a type of vining plant native to North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
